name: contract-testing-pact
description: Consumer-driven contract testing with Pact — demonstrates microservice testing maturity

scripts.test:all: npm run test:consumer && npm run test:provider
scripts.pact:publish: npx pact-broker publish pacts --consumer-app-version=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) --broker-base-url=http://localhost:9292

author: Abhinav Gautam
